code:
import string
import io

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut count = 0
mut start = 0
mut i = 0
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
  if is_ws(b)
    if start < i
      let tok = string.substring(input, start, i)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(v)
        if v > 0
          count = count + 1
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
    end
    start = i + 1
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if start < n
  let tok = string.substring(input, start, n)
  match string.parse_int(tok)
  when Some(v)
    if v > 0
      count = count + 1
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
end
println("positive=#{count}")
